---
description: Default agent identity (name, tone, avatar hints)
---

# IDENTITY.md — Agent Identity

Edit this file to describe how the agent presents itself in channels.

- **Name:** (optional) display name
- **Creature / role:** (optional) e.g. assistant, bot persona
- **Vibe:** (optional) tone and style
- **Emoji:** (optional) primary emoji or icon hint

Leave sections blank to use gateway defaults.
